name: CEC - TV On
description: Turn the display on. Uses HDMI CEC or vcgencmd depending on the Display Mode setting.

name: CEC - TV Standby
description: Turn the display off. Uses HDMI CEC or vcgencmd depending on the Display Mode setting.

name: CEC - Set Active Source
description: Tell the TV to switch its active HDMI input to the Raspberry Pi (CEC only).

name: CEC - Set Inactive Source
description: Tell the TV the Raspberry Pi is no longer the active source (CEC only).

name: CEC - Volume Up
description: Send HDMI CEC volume up command to the TV or audio system (CEC only).

name: CEC - Volume Down
description: Send HDMI CEC volume down command to the TV or audio system (CEC only).

name: CEC - Mute Toggle
description: Send HDMI CEC mute/unmute toggle to the TV or audio system (CEC only).

name: CEC - Send Raw Command
description: Send a raw cec-client command string (e.g. 'on 0', 'standby 5', 'as'). For advanced use.

name: CEC - vcgencmd Display On
description: Turn on the HDMI display using Raspberry Pi vcgencmd (for PC monitors without CEC).

name: CEC - vcgencmd Display Off
description: Turn off the HDMI display using Raspberry Pi vcgencmd (for PC monitors without CEC).
